name: Fighter: Champion Improved Critical — nat 19 triggers crit (L3)
description: Tests that a Level 3 Champion Fighter's Improved Critical feature expands the critical hit threshold to 19–20. A natural 19 on the attack roll MUST yield isCritical: true with doubled damage dice. Validates that roll-state-machine uses getCriticalHitThreshold() with the Champion subclass. Goblin AC 15 ensures nat 19 + 6 = 25 hits. Monster AI is set to endTurn so HP tracking is clean.

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: You score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20 (Champion subclass, level 3).

monsters.comment: Goblin Guard: AC 15 ensures natural 19+6=25 hits. HP 30 so it survives crit (max 2d8+4=20). AI endTurn prevents counter-damage from dirtying HP assertion.
monsters.name: Goblin Guard

actions.comment: === Initiate combat — Sir Aldric attacks the Goblin Guard ===

input.text: I attack the Goblin Guard with my Longsword

actions.comment: High initiative guarantees Sir Aldric acts first.
=== Round 1 Attack: natural 19 → must be isCritical: true for Champion L3 ===

Submit natural 19. Champion L3 crit threshold = 19. Expected: hit (19+6=25 vs AC 15) AND isCritical: true. If this assertion fails with isCritical: false, the tabletop roll-state-machine is not using getCriticalHitThreshold() for the Champion subclass.
Crit damage: 2d8 (doubled) + 4 STR mod. Submit 7 as the total dice roll (2d8 → 4+3). Server applies modifier: 7+4=11 total damage.

Goblin Guard took 11 crit damage. HP: 30 → 19. Narrow range to distinguish from a normal hit (1d8+4 with same dice would be at most 12 with max dice, but with our controlled 7+4=11 this is unambiguous).
